title: Rich Mod
description: Small mod that adds an economic
body:
# 📋 About mod
**Was there a lack of currency in Minecraft?**
This mod will add new **coins and banknotes** to the game, as well as an **ATM machine** with a **card** to store all your money in one item. This mod is _perfect_ for servers with an economy and playing with friends

**Coins, card and ATM machine cannot be created; they can only be obtained through the creative inventory or commands**
# 🆕 New features
- 🪙 Coins (1, 2, 5 and 10 dollars)
- 💵 Banknotes (50, 100, 500 and 1000 dollars)
- 💳 Card - store your money in one slot
- 🏧 ATM machine - deposit and withdraw money from your card
